retry_reason: Put operation is unconditional; after the call the skb may be freed, so retry would be use-after-free.
contract_summary: Put-wrapper that releases the reference on the sk_buff. The caller must not access skb after calling this function. This function is called to signal completion of a WMI HTC transmission, decrementing the skb's refcount and potentially freeing it.

judge.reason: The function solely calls dev_kfree_skb, which is a put operation on skb's refcount. No other logic exists.

check.reason: dev_kfree_skb consumes a reference on skb via skb->users.refs. The parameter skb (index 2, 1-indexed) is directly passed to dev_kfree_skb. The access path skb.users.refs and type chain sk_buff--refcount_t--atomic_t match the callee information and the struct definitions.
